title: Criminal Complaints: Mr. Tanawat Sutuntivorakoon
text:
Mr. Tanawat Sutuntivorakoon, a Chief Executive Officer of Bitazza Company Limited ("Bitazza"), has been responsible for the operation of Bitazza during the relevant period. His order or action resulted in Bitazza’s offence regarding the digital asset dealer without a license owing to joint providing the product known as "Freedom Card" with Freedomverse Company Limited. Accordingly, Mr. Tanawat shall also be liable for the penalties as provided for Bitazza’s offence.

Outcome: This case is in the process of inquiry by the inquiry official
relevant_law: 94 in conjunction with 26 and 83 of the Penal Code / DAB Act
name: Mr. Tanawat Sutuntivorakoon
